name: GAF_SyteLine_ResourceGroupInsert_Tool_v1
description: Add resource group records to routing operations on a standard job in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLJrtResourceGroups
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
Batch insert resource group records for multiple operations in one call:
{
  "IDOName": "SLJrtResourceGroups",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "     90001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "10"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Rgid", "Value": "FA-400-LRG"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "QtyResources", "Value": "1"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Resactn", "Value": "S"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Sequence", "Value": "1"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "     90001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "20"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Rgid", "Value": "INS-20-LRG"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "QtyResources", "Value": "1"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Resactn", "Value": "S"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Sequence", "Value": "1"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
CRITICAL: ONLY use these 7 properties: Job, Suffix, OperNum, Rgid, QtyResources, Resactn, Sequence. Do NOT add others.
Action 1 = insert. Include ALL operations in a single Changes array.
Job number must be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars.
Rgid MUST be a valid resource group from SLWcResourceGroups. Invalid Rgid returns error.
Rgid is CASE-SENSITIVE — use exact casing (e.g., 'Cut-10-MRG' not 'CUT-10-MRG').
Naming convention: <Wc>-LRG (Labor), <Wc>-MRG (Machine).
Resactn: 'S' = Allocate and Free (standard default).
QtyResources: number of resources needed (typically 1).
Sequence: resource sequence within operation (typically 1).
Routing operations MUST exist before inserting resource groups.
Example Request:
POST /update/SLJrtResourceGroups
Add resource groups to job 90001: LRG for op 10 (assembly), LRG for op 20 (inspection):
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if all inserts succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array of created resource group records
Each record should show Job, OperNum, Rgid, QtyResources.
Common errors:
- 'The Group entered is not valid': Rgid does not exist in SLWcResourceGroups (check casing)
- Duplicate: resource group already exists for this Job+OperNum+Sequence
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Add resource group records to routing operations. BATCH: ALL operations in one Changes array.
Fields: Job (10-char padded), Suffix='0', OperNum, Rgid (case-sensitive), QtyResources='1', Resactn='S', Sequence='1'.
Rgid naming: <Wc>-LRG (Labor), <Wc>-MRG (Machine). Must be valid from SLWcResourceGroups.
Routing must exist before inserting resource groups.

SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
